reason: This host is Python 3.9.6 on a ~2GB Docker VM. mem0ai latest requires Python>=3.10; offline mem0 needs a local LLM service (ollama) + a pulled model (multi-GB) since the DEFAULT llm is OpenAI (cloud+key). That does not fit the 2GB VM. Adapter raised the honest error instead of faking numbers.

capabilities.name: mem0
capabilities.notes: Identity is first-class (user_id scoping; per-user API keys + request_logs audit on the managed platform). Default LLM=OpenAI (cloud). posthog telemetry on by default. Latest requires Python>=3.10.
